label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won the uphill finish after attacking the GC group, catching lone breakaway rider HESSMANN Rob with 200m remaining.
tactical_patterns: 43-rider breakaway with 5+ minute gap prompted ALMEIDA to bridge solo, forcing GC group to chase rather than manage.
EVENEPOEL attacked after sustaining attacks, using offensive defense to neutralize GC threats while gaining stage win and bonus seconds.
ASTANA used ALMEIDA's bridge attempt to justify pace-making by LOPEZ Miguel Angel, benefiting their own GC ambitions.
Domestique HESSMANN Rob escaped final group with 200m remaining, nearly stealing stage from GC riders playing team tactics games.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: burned energy bridging to oversized breakaway, lost time in GC standings, dropped to sixth overall
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: controlled attacks then countered decisively, second stage win demonstrates superior form over MAS heading to Madrid
rider_signals.HESSMANN Rob: positive: Roglic domestique showed individual ambition and nearly won from breakaway despite GC group chasing behind
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: crashed early with VINE and PACHER, struggled throughout stage but limited losses despite mechanical disadvantage
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: crashed out while leading KOM competition, allowing CARAPAZ to take jersey with only 20-point margin
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: opportunistically seized KOM jersey from crashed VINE despite modest 20-point lead remaining fragile
